Partner Activation Playbook

How to Activate Your Partnership & Drive National Impact

Version 1.0

Welcome
Thank you for joining
America Prays

We are honored to have you as a partner in this historic movement of prayer. This playbook is your step-by-step guide to activating your partnership and engaging your audience in America Prays.

Inside you will find everything you need to set up your profile, promote the event, and maximize your impact as we prepare for a nationwide moment of prayer on July 4, 2026 — the 250th anniversary of the United States.

Your Mission
Unite your community in prayer for our nation
Key Date
July 4, 2026 — America's 250th Anniversary
Your Role
Activate your audience and amplify the movement

02
Partnership Overview
What is America Prays?

America Prays is a nationwide movement calling people across the country to unite in prayer. Led by the White House Faith Office and powered by Pray.com — the world's #1 app for daily prayer and faith-based content — America Prays brings together churches, ministries, and organizations to pray for our nation on its 250th anniversary.

As a partner, you play a vital role in activating your audience and helping this movement reach every corner of America.

70+
Partner Organizations
1.2B
Combined Reach
250
Years of America
Nationwide Movement
Powered by Pray.com
White House Faith Office
Your Partnership Includes
A dedicated partner profile on AmericaPrays.com
Co-branded marketing assets & social media toolkit
Access to the Partner Dashboard for tracking engagement
Featured placement in the Pray.com app & email campaigns
Dedicated partner support team

04
1
Step 1
Complete Your Partner Profile

Your partner profile is your organization's home on AmericaPrays.com. It will be visible to millions of users and serves as the hub for your prayer community during the event.

Profile Checklist
Upload your logo — High-res PNG or SVG on a transparent background
Write your bio — A short description of your organization (150 words max)
Add your prayer focus — Select up to 3 focus areas for your community
Link your website & social channels — So users can discover and follow you
Set your contact info — Designate a primary contact for partner communications
Grace Community Church
Partner Profile
Prayer Focus
Unity Revival Nation
About
A faith community dedicated to prayer and unity, serving the greater community since 1985.
Contact
gracecommunity.org
info@gracecommunity.org

2
Step 2 — Social Media
Activate Your Audience: Social Media

Use your social media channels to invite your community to join America Prays. We have prepared a full toolkit of ready-to-post graphics, captions, and videos to make it easy.

Social Toolkit Includes
Graphics & Banners
Branded images for all platforms
Pre-Written Captions
Copy-paste social copy
Video Assets
Short-form clips & reels
Hashtag Guide
#AmericaPrays #Pray250
Posting Schedule
1
Monthly
Countdown posts & awareness
2
Weekly
Prayer prompts & stories (last 4 weeks)
3
Day Of (July 4)
Live posts, stories, and event coverage
© 2025–2026 America Prays. All rights reserved.
06
2
Step 2 — Email & Newsletter
Activate Your Audience: Email

Email remains the most effective way to reach your community directly. We provide plug-and-play email templates designed for maximum engagement.

Announcement Email
Introduce America Prays to your list
Reminder Series
3-email drip leading up to July 4
Thank You / Recap
Post-event follow-up email
Email Best Practices
Personalize your subject line with your organization's name
Include a clear call-to-action: "Join us in prayer"
Add the America Prays banner to your email header
Link directly to your partner page on AmericaPrays.com
Send at least 2 weeks before July 4 for best results
© 2025–2026 America Prays. All rights reserved.
07
2
Step 2 — Key Dates
Major Events to Promote
National Mall Prayer Rally
June 28, 2026
A massive prayer gathering on the National Mall in Washington, D.C., kicking off the America Prays celebration week.
Salute to America 250
July 2–4, 2026
A multi-day celebration honoring America's 250th anniversary with prayer, worship, and patriotic events in D.C.
★ America Prays Day
July 4, 2026
America's 250th birthday. The day of united national prayer. All-day live events, prayer streams, and local gatherings across the country.
Freedom Tour
Ongoing 2026
A traveling prayer experience visiting cities across America, building momentum leading to July 4th and beyond.
© 2025–2026 America Prays. All rights reserved.
08
3
Step 3
Host or Join Prayer Events

Whether you host your own prayer gathering or join a national moment of prayer through the Pray.com app, your participation is what makes America Prays a truly nationwide movement.

Event Ideas
Church Prayer Night
Host a special July 4th prayer service at your church or venue
Community Gathering
Organize a public prayer event at a park, square, or monument
Virtual Prayer Room
Create a live prayer session via the Pray.com app
Small Group Prayer
Encourage small groups to dedicate a session to praying for America
How to Create an Event
1
Log in to your Partner Dashboard at AmericaPrays.com
2
Click "Create Event" and fill in your details
3
Choose in-person, virtual, or hybrid format
4
Share the event link with your community
5
Track RSVPs and engagement from your dashboard
© 2025–2026 America Prays. All rights reserved.

Brand Guidelines
Brand Guidelines & Co-Marketing Assets

Maintaining brand consistency across all partner communications is essential. Please follow these guidelines when using America Prays assets.

Do
Use official logos from the partner portal
Do
Maintain clear space around the logo
Don't
Alter colors, proportions, or add effects
Don't
Use the logo on cluttered backgrounds

Messaging Guidelines
Key Themes
Unity in prayer across all backgrounds
Celebrating America's 250th anniversary
Hope and faith for the future of our nation
Community and togetherness
Messaging to Avoid
Partisan or politically divisive language
Exclusionary messaging toward any group
Fundraising or solicitation tied to America Prays

11
FAQ
Frequently Asked Questions
How do I access the Partner Dashboard?
Visit AmericaPrays.com/partners and log in with the credentials sent to your registered email address. From there you can manage your profile, create events, and track engagement.
Can I customize the marketing assets with my logo?
Yes! Co-branded templates are available in the Partner Portal. You can add your logo alongside the America Prays branding on social graphics, email headers, and event flyers.
Is there a cost to participate as a partner?
Partnership in America Prays is offered at no cost. Our goal is to unite as many organizations as possible in this historic moment of national prayer.
How will my organization be promoted?
Your organization will be featured on AmericaPrays.com, in the Pray.com app, and in email campaigns to millions of users. Your partner profile serves as a hub for your prayer community.
How do I create a prayer event?
Log in to your Partner Dashboard, click "Create Event," and fill out the form with your event details. You can create in-person, virtual, or hybrid events that will appear on the America Prays event map.
What support is available if I need help?
You have a dedicated partner manager, access to a help center with tutorials, and monthly partner calls. Reach us anytime at partners@americaprays.com.
Can multiple people from my organization access the dashboard?
Yes, you can invite team members through the Partner Dashboard settings. Each person will receive their own login credentials.
What happens after July 4th?
America Prays continues beyond July 4th as an ongoing movement of prayer. Your partner profile and event tools remain active, and we encourage continued engagement through the Pray.com platform.
© 2025–2026 America Prays. All rights reserved.
